issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, such as invalid tokens or network failures.
The installation script uses curl|bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: add-staging-context
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric criteria, while Response A does not use the required context commands.

scenarios.name: create-redis-database
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets the coolify create/start steps, while Response A uses manual Redis/Docker commands and misses all rubric points.

scenarios.name: list-and-validate-servers
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides the required commands and avoids SSH/manual checks, earning 80 points, whereas Response A offers no commands and thus scores 0.
